action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed with RuntimeError on CNN kernel size (8x8 > 7x7 input); previous FlatObs+Mlp got tiny success_rate=0.002 on only FourRooms after 500k-2M steps; predict.py and train.py now inconsistent on wrapper (Img discards mission text which is critical for these tasks). Analysis: Default CnnPolicy incompatible with Minigrid 7x7 partial obs without custom extractor; ignoring mission hurts multi-task performance severely; DummyVecEnv+SB3 PPO pipeline is stable but undertrained (1M steps/env too few for most sparse-reward navigation/puzzle tasks). Decision: Revert both scripts to consistent FlatObsWrapper (includes image+direction+mission encoding) + MlpPolicy with larger net_arch, tune to lr=5e-4/ent_coef=0.02 for exploration, scale to 10M timesteps (~4x prior, expect ~20min), increase post-eval to 10 eps/env for reliable metrics; submit_eval immediately after for new baseline on easy envs (DoorKey/FourRooms/LavaGap should improve).
